name: brainrot-cursor-extension
description: Plays a sound and shows a random meme whenever your tests, builds, or programs fail in the terminal.

brainrot.enabled.description: Master switch — enable or disable all failure sounds.

brainrot.onTestFailure.description: Play sound when a test command fails.

brainrot.onBuildFailure.description: Play sound when a build or compile command fails.

brainrot.onRuntimeFailure.description: Play sound when a runtime command (server, script) crashes.

brainrot.onAnyFailure.description: Play sound on ANY non-zero exit code. Overrides category-specific settings. Can be noisy!

brainrot.sound.description: Which built-in sound to play on failure.

brainrot.customSoundPath.description: Absolute path to a custom .wav file. Overrides the built-in sound selection when set.

brainrot.extraTestCommands.description: Additional command names to treat as test runs (e.g. 'my-test-runner').

brainrot.extraBuildCommands.description: Additional command names to treat as build/compile runs (e.g. 'my-build-tool').

brainrot.extraRunCommands.description: Additional command names to treat as runtime runs (e.g. 'my-server').

brainrot.showNotification.description: Show a notification with a random message when a failure is detected.

brainrot.showFailureImage.description: Open a random image from the failure-images folder when an error is detected.

brainrot.failureImagesPath.description: Path to a folder of failure images relative to the workspace root (png, jpg, gif, webp). Leave empty to use 'failure-images/' in the workspace root.

brainrot.failureImageDuration.description: How many seconds the failure image stays open before auto-closing (1–60).
